Now, regarding the annual fee rebate.

The policy says:
- The rebate is earned only if you meet the required monthly spending threshold ($7,500) in every month of your cardmember year.
- If your first cardmember year's annual fee is waived under a promotional offer, the rebate does not apply to that year. Eligibility begins with the next cardmember year.
- The monthly windows start from the account opening date.

So I need to check:
1. Was the first year's fee waived? That would affect which year we're looking at.
2. What was their spending in each month of the relevant cardmember year?

Let me get the credit card transactions to check their spending patterns. I should also look up if there's any info about the annual fee or promotional offers in the knowledge base.

Cardmember Year 2: 11/10/2023 - 11/09/2024

Let me get the transactions to check.
